name: Keenbranch
descs:
[Effects apply only to #3, #4 Deployed Identities]

In a Clash, Clash Power +1; Pierce Skills deal +20% damage.

In an unopposed attack, Pierce Skills deal +10% damage.

[Effects apply only to #3, #4, and #5 Deployed Identities]

In a Clash, Clash Power +1; Pierce Skills deal +20% damage.

In an unopposed attack, Pierce Skills deal +10% damage.

[Effects apply only to #3, #4, #5, and #6 Deployed Identities]

In a Clash, Clash Power +1; Pierce Skills deal +25% damage.

In an unopposed attack, Pierce Skills deal +12.5% damage.
